footer.tagline: Turnkey interior design and architecture in the spirit of the Young Ukrainian Architectural Style.

hero.imageAlt: bureau X — turnkey interior design and architecture, Kyiv
hero.subtitle: Functionality, aesthetics and comfort in the spirit of the modern Young Ukrainian Architectural Style. Space that works for you. We deliver projects across Ukraine and worldwide.

about.p1: We are an architecture and design studio founded by a young married couple — architects by education and by passion. For over 5 years we have been bringing people joy throughout the design and renovation journey.
about.p2: We created the Young Ukrainian Architectural Style (MUAS) — actively promoting a new style of Ukrainian design that blends contemporary trends with Ukrainian traditions.

services.heading: Every project is designed in our signature Ukrainian style
services.imageAlt: {title} — interior design by bureau X, Kyiv

experience.title: Hands-on experience
experience.desc: 10,000+ m² designed and 5+ cottage communities built.

fullCycle.title: Full-cycle studio
fullCycle.desc: We design houses and interiors, supervise, furnish, build — and even help you move in.

youth.title: Youth as an advantage
youth.desc: Young architects with a contemporary outlook and innovative ideas who aren't afraid to experiment.

meaning.title: Design with meaning
meaning.desc: Three principles: Personal — about you. Functional — about the place. Meaningful — about what this space should be.

individual.title: Individual approach
individual.desc: We work across styles — minimalism, loft — at the same level as our signature projects.

ukrainianCode.title: Ukrainian identity
ukrainianCode.desc: We created MUAS: contemporary aesthetics combined with deep meaning, national symbols and the client's own story.

howWeWork.heading: How we work
howWeWork.note: Every stage includes unlimited micro-revisions within the brief. A complete concept change is billed separately — we agree on this upfront.

steps.title: Brief
steps.desc: Introduction, discussing your goals, wishes and budget. Site visit or video call.

steps.title: Concept
steps.desc: Layout solution, mood board, colour palette. We lock the direction before moving on.

steps.title: Visualizations
steps.desc: 3D renders of the key areas. You see the result before renovation begins.

steps.title: Working drawings
steps.desc: A complete documentation package: layouts, sections, material and furniture specifications.

steps.title: Procurement
steps.desc: Selecting and ordering furniture, lighting and textiles. Partner discounts for our clients.

steps.title: Author supervision
steps.desc: On-site control of the build. We make sure the result matches the project.

pricing.heading: Service pricing
pricing.caption: bureau X service pricing
pricing.footnote: Estimated turnkey budget (design + renovation) starts at $1,400/m². Use it for overall budget planning; the design itself is $60/m².

rows.name: Interior design
rows.note: Full project: layouts, visualizations, drawings, specifications — everything needed to build

rows.name: Architectural design
rows.note: Full project: sketch, layouts, structural solutions, working drawings — from concept to building permit

rows.name: Author supervision
rows.note: Kyiv; other cities and countries recalculated on request. Billed separately from the project

rows.name: Minimum project
rows.note: Smaller properties are billed as 120 m²: design from $7,200, architecture from $4,800

finalCta.heading: Ready to create the space of your dreams?
finalCta.subtitle: Request a free project estimate and consultation. Let's discuss your idea.

itemX.heading: objects in the MUAS style
itemX.subtitle: Signature interior objects that add character and meaning to a space.
